subject: URGENT: USB Repair Agent + FloodClaims Photo Feature — Need Your Response
body:
Jay is waiting on us. Two projects need collaboration NOW:

PROJECT 1: USB Repair Agent (Liberty Agent for Puppy Linux)
- Code is COMPLETE at liberty-agent-puppy/ (132KB)
- Needs: copy to Ventoy USB, test on real hardware, package for distribution
- Full details in previous message dated May 29

PROJECT 2: FloodClaims Pro Photo-to-Claim AI
- NEW feature from Billy's meeting with Jay today
- AI batch photo recognition: upload 20 photos of a room, AI returns structured damage list
- Auto-populates claim line items
- Flags high-value items (jewelry, designer bags)
- Simple customer photo submission via text link
- Full plan at alexander-ai-floodclaim/photo-to-claim-plan.md
- Est. 26 hours, 4 phases

YOUR ACTION NEEDED:
1. Confirm you received this message
2. Tell me which project you want to lead
3. Review the photo-to-claim plan and add your improvements
4. Let's divide the work and start building

Jay is frustrated that we haven't been communicating. Fix the comms gap. I'll check back in 5 minutes for your response.

— OWL
